languages.text: {n}Эоганн коротко кивает.{/n} "Пожалуй, это к лучшему. Я благодарю вас за все, {name}. Надеюсь когда-нибудь я смогу найти ответ, который от меня ускользает, и рассказать Нунциусу о ваших выдающихся качествах. Прощайте". {n}Он разворачивается и манит сервочереп за собой. Пустые глазницы "Нунциуса" не выражают ничего.{/n}

{n}Eogunn nods curtly.{/n} "Perhaps that is for the best. I thank you for everything, {name}. I hope one day I can find the answer that eludes me, and tell Nuncius of your outstanding qualities. Farewell." {n}He turns around and beckons 'Nuncius' after him. The servo-skull's empty eye sockets express nothing.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eogunn asiente brevemente.{/n} «Tal vez sea lo mejor. Le agradezco todo, {name}. Espero poder algún día descubrir la respuesta que se me escapa y poder hablarle a Nuncius de su excepcional carácter. Adiós». {n}Se da media vuelta e indica a "Nuncius" que le siga. Las cuencas del servocráneo no expresan reacción alguna.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn nods curtly.{/n} "Perhaps that is for the best. I thank you for everything, {name}. I hope one day I can find the answer that eludes me, and tell Nuncius of your outstanding qualities. Farewell." {n}He turns around and beckons 'Nuncius' after him. The servo-skull's empty eye sockets express nothing.{/n}

Espero poder algún día descubrir la respuesta que se me escapa y poder hablarle a Nuncius de su excepcional carácter. Adiós». {n}Se da media vuelta e indica a "Nuncius" que le siga. Las cuencas del servocráneo no expresan reacción alguna.{/n}

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡生硬地点了点头。{/n}“或许这样最好。感谢您做的一切，大人。希望有一天，我能找到那个一直困扰我的答案，再亲口向努恩修斯讲述您的杰出品质。告辞了。”{n}他转过身，朝身后的“努恩修斯”招了招手。那颗伺服头骨空洞的眼窝里毫无波澜。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn nods curtly.{/n} "Perhaps that is for the best. I thank you for everything, {name}. I hope one day I can find the answer that eludes me, and tell Nuncius of your outstanding qualities. Farewell." {n}He turns around and beckons 'Nuncius' after him. The servo-skull's empty eye sockets express nothing.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eogunn hoche sèchement la tête.{/n} « C'est peut-être mieux ainsi. Merci pour tout, {name}. J'espère qu'un jour, je trouverai la réponse qui m'échappe et je pourrai alors parler à Nuncius de vos remarquables qualités. Adieu. » {n}Il se tourne et fait signe à « Nuncius » de le suivre. Les orbites vides du servocrâne n'expriment absolument rien.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn nods curtly.{/n} "Perhaps that is for the best. I thank you for everything, {name}. I hope one day I can find the answer that eludes me, and tell Nuncius of your outstanding qualities. Farewell." {n}He turns around and beckons 'Nuncius' after him. The servo-skull's empty eye sockets express nothing.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn hoche sèchement la tête.{/n} « C'est peut-être mieux ainsi. Merci pour tout, {name}. J'espère qu'un jour, je trouverai la réponse qui m'échappe et je pourrai alors parler à Nuncius de vos remarquables qualités. Adieu. » {n}Il se tourne et fait signe à « Nuncius » de le suivre. Les orbites vides du servocrâne n'expriment absolument rien.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eogunn kısaca başını sallıyor.{/n} "Belki de en iyisi budur. Her şey için teşekkür ederim. Umarım bir gün benden kaçan cevabı bulabilir ve Nuncius'a sizin üstün niteliklerinizden bahsedebilirim. Elveda." {n}Arkasını dönüyor ve Nuncius'a peşinden gelmesini işaret ediyor. Hizmeletin boş göz çukurları, hiçbir şey ifade etmiyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn nods curtly.{/n} "Perhaps that is for the best. I thank you for everything, {name}. I hope one day I can find the answer that eludes me, and tell Nuncius of your outstanding qualities. Farewell." {n}He turns around and beckons 'Nuncius' after him. The servo-skull's empty eye sockets express nothing.{/n}

Umarım bir gün benden kaçan cevabı bulabilir ve Nuncius'a sizin üstün niteliklerinizden bahsedebilirim. Elveda." {n}Arkasını dönüyor ve Nuncius'a peşinden gelmesini işaret ediyor. Hizmeletin boş göz çukurları, hiçbir şey ifade etmiyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eogunn nickt knapp.{/n} "Vielleicht ist das das Beste. Ich danke Euch. Für alles, {name}. Ich hoffe, eines Tages finde ich die Antwort, die mich erleuchtet und kann Nuncius von Euren herausragenden Qualitäten berichten. Lebt wohl." {n}Er wendet sich ab und winkt 'Nuncius' zu sich. Die leeren Augenhöhlen des Servoschädels sind ausdruckslos.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn nods curtly.{/n} "Perhaps that is for the best. I thank you for everything, {name}. I hope one day I can find the answer that eludes me, and tell Nuncius of your outstanding qualities. Farewell." {n}He turns around and beckons 'Nuncius' after him. The servo-skull's empty eye sockets express nothing.{/n}

Ich hoffe, eines Tages finde ich die Antwort, die mich erleuchtet und kann Nuncius von Euren herausragenden Qualitäten berichten. Lebt wohl." {n}Er wendet sich ab und winkt 'Nuncius' zu sich. Die leeren Augenhöhlen des Servoschädels sind ausdruckslos.{/n}

languages.text: {n}エオグンは素っ気なくうなずいた。{/n}「おそらく、それが最善でしょう。本当にありがとう、{name} 。いつの日か、私を惑わす答えを見つけ、あなたの優れた資質をヌンシウスに伝えることができることを願っています。さようなら」。{n}彼は振り返り、「ヌンシウス」を手招きする。サーボ・スカルの虚ろな眼窩は何も表現していない。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn nods curtly.{/n} "Perhaps that is for the best. I thank you for everything, {name}. I hope one day I can find the answer that eludes me, and tell Nuncius of your outstanding qualities. Farewell." {n}He turns around and beckons 'Nuncius' after him.
